history.content:
<thought>
In this view, my position `^` is at row 07 column D (facing up). The cell directly in front (row 06 column D) is `L` (lava), so I cannot move forward. I need to find a non-wall, non-lava option: to my left is row 07 column C which is `#` (wall), and to my right is row 07 column E which is `.` (free floor). So I should turn right to move into the safe cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal at row 05, column B, but it is currently not directly reachable. My current position is at row 07, column D facing up (toward row 06, column D). The cell in front (row 06, column D) is '.', so it's safe to move forward to approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal at row 06 column B. My current position is at row 07 column D facing up (toward row 06). The cell directly ahead (row 06 column D) is '.' and is safe, while moving left toward the goal would require first turning. I will move forward one step.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal `G` to my left (row 07, column B) and lava `L` is to my left of that. However, the cell directly in front of me (row 07, column D) is floor `.` while the other visible left/right options include `#` walls. To avoid lava and walls, I will move forward into the floor cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal at row 07 column B, which is to my left. My current position is indicated by ^ at row 07 column D, so the next move toward the goal is to face left. The cell directly to my left (row 07 column C) is lava (L), so I cannot move left immediately. Therefore, I should rotate left to re-orient and look for a safe path around the lava toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal at row 05, column D. From my current position (row 07, column D labeled with ^), the cell directly in front (row 06, column D) is lava (L), so I can’t move forward. To approach the goal safely, I should move into the open cell to my left (row 07, column C is .) by turning left and then moving forward next.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at row 07 column F, visible to my right. My current facing shows lava (`L`) directly in front (row 07 column E is `L`), so I can’t move forward that way. I should turn right to face the open cell at row 07 column D (`.`) and then proceed toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal at row 05, column D. From my position (row 07, column D), the goal is two cells ahead (upwards) with row 06, column D being free (.)—so moving forward should bring me closer and is safe (not lava). The cell directly in front is not L or #.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
